name: accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, inaccurate tax withholding summaries cause compliance issues and penalties. We automate the compilation and emailing of summaries instead of manual compilation of tax summaries.
problem_solved: Inaccurate tax withholding summaries can lead to compliance issues and penalties.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate tax withholding summaries can lead to compliance issues and penalties.
